_comment: Curated review notes for templates that still do not resolve to a trustworthy player-facing localized name. Keep this file in sync with template_ingame_names.json::_unresolved.

AmericaBattleDroneHulk.note: Destroyed hull/debris helper for the Battle Drone. Not a player-buildable object or a readable unit label.

AmericaBattleshipBogusTarget.note: Internal targeting helper tied to the Battleship weapon logic. Keep out of player-facing outputs.

AmericaCrateParachute.note: Parachute helper used for dropped crates. Not a controllable unit or building.

AmericaDeadDozerHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the USA dozer. Treat as debris, not a spawnable unit.

AmericaJetA10Hulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for the A10 strike plane.

AmericaJetAuroraHulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for the Aurora Bomber.

AmericaJetCargoHulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for a cargo plane helper.

AmericaJetRaptorHulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for the Raptor.

AmericaJetStealthHulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for the Stealth Fighter.

AmericaParachute.note: Generic parachute helper object used by air-drop logic.

AmericaScoutDroneHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Scout Drone helper.

AmericaVehicleTomahawkHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Tomahawk missile launcher.

AuroraBomb.note: Payload projectile tied to the Aurora Bomber attack, not a unit label.

BinaryDataStream.note: Visual beam/data-stream helper. The exact in-game label is not player-facing and should stay out of readable reports.

BioHazardCleanupStreamProjectile.note: Cleanup spray projectile used by toxin-cleanup logic rather than a spawnable template.

CINE_DemoTrapDetonationObject.note: Cinematic detonation helper for a Demo Trap explosion.

ChinaDeadDozerHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the China dozer.

ChinaJetMIGHulk.note: Destroyed aircraft hull for the MiG.

ChinaTankOverlordBattleBunker.note: Attachment module mounted on an Overlord, not a standalone player-facing unit template.

ChinaTankOverlordGattlingCannon.note: Attachment module mounted on an Overlord, not a standalone unit.

ChinaTankOverlordPropagandaTower.note: Attachment module mounted on an Overlord, not a standalone unit.

ChinaVehicleNukeCannonHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Nuke Cannon.

ChinaVehicleTroopCrawlerDeadHull.note: Destroyed hull for the Troop Crawler.

CleanupHazardProjectileStream.note: Cleanup stream helper tied to toxin cleanup logic.

CleanupStreamProjectile.note: Cleanup stream projectile; not a player-facing template.

DaisyCutterGas.note: Area-of-effect gas cloud created by the Fuel Air Bomb / Daisy Cutter weapon.

DeadBombTruckHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Bomb Truck.

DeadChinaGattlingTankHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Gattling Tank.

DeadChinaSupplyTruckHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the China Supply Truck.

DeadCrusaderHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Crusader tank.

DeadMarauderHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Marauder Tank.

DeadPaladinHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Paladin tank.

DeadQuadCannonHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Quad Cannon.

DeadRadarVanHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Radar Van.

DeadRocketBuggyHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Rocket Buggy.

DeadSCUDLauncherHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the SCUD Launcher.

DeadScorpionHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Scorpion tank.

DeadTankHulk.note: Generic destroyed tank hull helper used by explosions; not a distinct player-facing unit.

DeadTechnicalJeepHulk.note: Destroyed hull for a jeep-style Technical chassis.

DeadTechnicalTruckHulk.note: Destroyed hull for a truck-style Technical chassis.

DeadTechnicalVanHulk.note: Destroyed hull for a van-style Technical chassis.

DeadToxinTractorHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Toxin Tractor.

DemoTrapDetonationObject.note: Explosion helper object for a Demo Trap detonation.

DestroyedMilitiaTank.note: Mission/campaign destruction prop rather than a player-buildable vehicle.

DragonTankFlameProjectile.note: Primary flame projectile used by the Dragon Tank.

DragonTankFlameProjectileUpgraded.suspected_name: Dragon Tank Black Napalm flame stream
DragonTankFlameProjectileUpgraded.note: Upgraded flame projectile used by the Dragon Tank after napalm upgrades.

FlamethrowerProjectileStream.note: Generic flame stream helper, most closely tied to Dragon Tank style flame weapons.

FlamethrowerProjectileStreamUpgraded.note: Upgraded flame stream helper for napalm-enhanced flame weapons.

HumveeMissile.note: Missile projectile fired by a TOW-upgraded Humvee.

InfernoCannonHulk.note: Destroyed hull for the Inferno Cannon.

LaserBeam.note: Generic beam helper used by laser-based weapons or visuals, not a unit name.

ParticleUplinkCannon_IntenseConnectorLas.note: Visual connector beam used by the Particle Cannon superweapon.

ParticleUplinkCannon_MediumConnectorLase.note: Visual connector beam used by the Particle Cannon superweapon.

ParticleUplinkCannon_OrbitalLaser.note: Main orbital beam effect for the Particle Cannon superweapon.

PatriotBinaryDataStream.note: Patriot-specific beam/data-stream helper, not a player-facing unit or building label.

PointDefenseLaserBeam.note: Laser beam helper tied to the Paladin point-defense weapon.

RemoteC4Charge.note: Remote C4 charge placed by Colonel Burton.

RocketBuggyMissile.note: Missile projectile fired by the Rocket Buggy.

SDILasers.note: Internal laser-effect helper. Likely tied to scripted defense or superweapon visuals rather than a named buildable.

ScudStormMissile.note: Superweapon missile fired by the SCUD Storm.

TNTStickyBomb.note: Attached explosive helper, not a player-facing unit or upgrade label.

TankHunterMissile.note: Missile projectile fired by a Tank Hunter.

TechnicalRPGMissile.note: Rocket fired by an RPG-carrying Technical passenger.

TimedC4Charge.note: Timed C4 charge placed by Colonel Burton.

ToxinTruckProjectileStream.note: Primary toxin stream helper used by the Toxin Tractor.

ToxinTruckProjectileStreamUpgraded.note: Upgraded toxin stream helper used after Anthrax Beta.

ToxinTruckSprayProjectile.note: Projectile/spray helper for the Toxin Tractor.

ToxinTruckStreamProjectile.note: Projectile helper for the Toxin Tractor stream weapon.

ToxinTruckStreamProjectileUpgraded.note: Upgraded toxin stream projectile used after Anthrax Beta.

TunnelDefenderMissile.note: Rocket fired by the Tunnel Defender / RPG Trooper weapon.
